radarr.last_sha_note: As of 2026-05-31 the Radarr 6.1.1+ delta was reviewed and applicable fixes are already in (most via 26f765b15c, plus the QB 5.2 login fix in e6e843b16e). Future runs of catchup.py advance this cursor forward.
